title: MistaThings Better Mace
description: Remodels the mace into a vanilla 3d look and the heavy core.
body:
**Transform your Minecraft experience with MistaThings Better Mace! This texture pack remodels the newly-added mace, giving it a 3d design instead of a 2d one, and retextures the heavy core to resemble the remodeled mace!**

Here are some previews of the mace (more can be seen in the gallery section)
![The new heavy core and mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3db800e3665652a653469c4152ae423e3732bc7.png)

![The new mace and heavy core in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0171b8d8b916bd4df3eb0407212d380a654c10b4.png)
